ads.author: Charlie Miller
ads.title: Mid-Century Kluk-Kluk Decanter By Jacob E. Bang
ads.description: The Kluk-Kluk decanter draws its name from the noise it makes when liquid is poured, noise that is amplified by this bottle. Initially used only for schnapps, this bottle is very popular in Denmark, and over time, it was produced by Holmegaard in a myriad of shapes, sizes, and colors. The first Kluk-Kluk designed by Jacob Bang was produced in 1928 but Bang kept revisiting the piece. This model was probably designed in the late 1950s or early 1960s and retains its original label and original box. (Label recently fell off but I still have it.) Please see all photos for accurate description. *Fun Fact for Star Trek Fans - The Kluk-Kluk decanter was used in several episodes of Star Trek. Cash only. No venmo, cashapp or zelle. Located in Adairsville near the Food Lion but can also meet in Canton/Woodstock, Milton/Alpharetta or Ballground. All sales proceeds go directly towards my small blind and senior horse sanctuary ElectricHorse.org Thank you so much for looking!
